text:
Handbook and FAQ links are broken.

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/ 

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/faq/

Website is giving the following error for both links:

Page not found.
Oh no. :(
We could not find the page you requested.

Please try your request again, use one of the links in the navigation menu, or the search box at the top of the page.
